title: Wilderdark
short_description: First-person survival horror on a hostile island stalked by ectoparasitic dinosaurs — gather evidence and craft tools to survive.
description: Something dangerous is lurking in the wilderness. Wilderdark is a first-person survival horror game where you must navigate a strange island inhabited by ectoparasitic dinosaurs and organisms. You must remain vigilant to stealthily obtain evidence, samples, and craft tools to survive.
